tool.name: Mac Ping Host
tool.description: Test network connectivity by pinging a host.

host.description: Hostname or IP address to ping

count.description: Number of ping packets to send

ai.systemPromptSection:
### mac_ping
Ping a host to test connectivity.

**Format:**
```tool_request
{"tool": "mac_ping", "query": "{\"host\": \"google.com\", \"count\": 4}"}
```

**Parameters:**
- host: Hostname or IP (required)
- count: Number of pings (default: 4)
- timeout: Timeout in ms (default: 5000)

**Returns:** success, packetsTransmitted, packetsReceived, packetLoss, minTime, avgTime, maxTime
whenToUse: Checking if a server is reachable
